form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished sixth on March 15 over 407m at this track behind Indigo Beach, beaten 9 lengths (24.71) in a Grade 6. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth on March 1 over 510m at this track behind Wangaroa Wally, beaten 19 lengths (31.98) in a Grade 5/6. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped and carried wider in the back straight.
Raced wider entering the back straight and bumped.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 2nd on April 12 over 407m at this track behind Farmor Senior beaten 2.25 lengths (24.30) in a Grade 6. Found one better last time. Well placed and worth following up.

form.formComment: Disappointed last time but just missed the placings two back over 366m at Capalaba. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

form.formComment: Was strongly supported last time but ran below expectations when sixth over 407m at this track in 24.84. Looks a solid top-three chance.
